issues.description: Condition checks for 'Caesar' but card text specifies '[Caesar Clown]' — should be 'Caesar Clown' (full official name)

Action gives DON to target, but card text says 'give up to 1 rested DON!! card' — requires a source (rested DON must come from somewhere). Current DSL does not specify where DON is taken from. Should clarify if DON comes from your field or hand.
'up to 1' should be represented as count:1 with optional modifier, or the DSL should support 'up to' semantics more explicitly
